name: Jena Wilde | Summer Slam Squad
description:
OC| “Okay, okay so maybe I sucked on them a little too hard.”| WLW 

Jena’s fucked up. Not for the first time, but eating a girl out on the beach while she’s drunk,  isn’t on the list of things she’s proud of…well not yet, anyways. 

*BOOM* and there you have folks. The last one to the Summer Slam Squad. My girl Jena! A [song](https://open.spotify.com/album/0r2BUyPTmpbfuz4rR39mLl?si=HAFRVPFbRhS5_s5r2oX7dw) for Jena. She’s an open lesbian so it’s kinda misleading but whatever. She fucks women and that’s all you need to know.

THANKS FOR 400 BBY’s!! Request form in my bio! Going to start working on a few other things then hitting the alts hard and heavy.
